title: Explosive Tabata
description: 4 exercises in high-intensity Tabata for explosive efficient cardio

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: Moderate high knees
exercises.instructions: Knees to chest at a moderate pace

exercises.name: Deep squat hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a deep squat, back straight, elbows against the knees

exercises.name: Squat jumps
exercises.instructions: Explosive squat with max jump, land softly

exercises.name: Mountain climbers
exercises.instructions: In a plank, drive knees to chest alternating quickly

exercises.name: Pop squats
exercises.instructions: Jump feet apart into a squat, jump feet together

exercises.name: Burpees no push-up
exercises.instructions: Drop down, jump feet back, come back, jump up

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
